title: Apotheotic Creation (Create 6.0)
description: Port of Apotheotic Creation. Simple addon which allows defining Create attribute filters for Apotheosis rarities and affixes
body:
Port of [Apotheotic Creation](https://modrinth.com/mod/apotheoticcreation). Simple addon which allows defining Create attribute filters for Apotheosis rarities and affixes.

![Attribute Filter. Selected attributes.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f72954c9f23eb14ed28f51416c10882e7720c7f7.png)
